name: NCAB Group AB (publ)
summary: NCAB Group AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells printed circuit boards (PCBs). The company offers multilayer, high density interconnect, radio frequency, insulated metal base, flexible, rigid-flex, semi-flex, and double sided PCBs. Its products are used in various applications, including digital cameras, compact medical devices, surgical light, electrical car charging, mirror eye-camera, and other applications. The company serves aerospace and defense, automotive, datacom, industrial, IOT, medical, power and energy, railway, safety-critical, and telecom industries. It operates in Benelux, China, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Italy, Malaysia, North Macedonia, Norway, Poland, Russia, Spain, Sweden, the United Kingdom, and the United States. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Bromma, Sweden.
